string 2: Hm? You here for us?
{next}I bear word from Kunlun.
{next}What're you doing?
{next}This place sure is fun, right?

Huh?! Oh, I guess it's been a while since we last checked
in.
My masters said we'd be training at the arena.

It sure is! It's an exciting place where you can test both
your strength and tactics!

Ah, you know Kunlun. You must be a worthy warrior of this
world.

We came here to train, but we're not used to this world, so
it's difficult to fight.

Yeah, we really did come here to train. It's the truth. I
guess we lost track of time.
{next}Did you forget your original purpose?
{next}You should probably wrap things up here.
{next}Time to accept your punishment!

Yes, I suppose we did... It's just that we were having so
much fun!
The masters refuse to listen to anyone weaker than they are.

You probably shouldn't say things like that lightly. The
masters are pretty strong.

I understand that the host has ordered us to return, but we
must refuse.

Fighting in this arena fills us, body and soul, with joy. We
can't leave now.
Yes, but this person came all this way on orders from Kunlun to find us.

Perhaps we should respect those orders. It is true that we
have neglected our mission.
But, Master, we...
Yes, Master Zanbamon... Shall we...?

Very well. Let us give this one a proper opportunity to
bring us in.

...You heard Master Zanbamon! You're to face us in battle
here in the Paradise Colosseum!
{next}Sure. No problem.
{next}Does it have to be this way?
{next}I'll warn you. I'm rather formidable.

Oh, you're quite enthusiastic, aren't you? Do you even care
about the reason for all this?

This is just how we are. Everything comes down to proving
oneself in battle.

Is that supposed to be an impression of the masters? Well,
you're not very good at it.

We only listen to those who are strong. That's just the way
we are.

That's right. We'll see if you have what it takes to
convince us to return to duty.

Fortunately, we're here in the arena. It'll serve as the
perfect backdrop for our duel.

I imagine you must also prepare yourself for battle. Let us
know when you are ready.

You can find us entered into the bouts at the Paradise
Colosseum. Come take us on once you're ready!

Impossible... How could you defeat all of us...? Just who
are you, really?
{next}Kunlun's envoy.
{next}I have to keep my identity secret.
{next}Just a lost soul passing through.

Hm... So that's all you're willing to share? Your wariness
is a sign of inner darkness.

I had a feeling you'd say that. Indeed, there's nothing
ordinary about you.
I find that rather hard to believe!

Wow, you were really strong out there! You took down the
masters like they were nothing!
You have bested us. Which means...
{next}Don't keep Kunlun waiting.
{next}You'll listen to what I have to say?
{next}Okay, on to the next match.
Yes, I know. However, we are not ready just yet.

Now, now. Don't be in such a hurry. As they say, "Haste
makes waste," right?

It seems you enjoy the arena as much as we do. I doubt we
can keep up with you, though.

You have bested us. I hereby grant you the right to face
Susanomon, the ultimate hero!
Wow! You're so lucky!
What's the matter? You look dissatisfied, somehow.

Did you think we would simply agree to your request because
of this victory?

You have not beaten all of us yet. Susanomon is also among
our ranks.

Susanomon's currently out taking in the sights, but should
be back soon.

You've bested us, so I'll summon Susanomon now. I suggest
you get ready.

I have thoroughly enjoyed our encounter here. Take this as a
token of our gratitude.

Ah, so these are the Royal Knights. They look strong enough
to be a worthy challenge...

I am only joking. Let us work together! Thank you for your
help. Here. This is for you.

That card game the Royal Knights play sure looks fun. We can
play for a bit, right?

This is an ideal place to train. It's important to prepare
for whatever may come!

Our warrior's code and the Royal Knights' chivalry are an
unbeatable combination!

We shared some of our energy with the Royal Knights in order
to aid in the final battle.
Thank you.
You're not personally joining the battle?
Okay, see you later!

You are most welcome, but it is not just for your benefit
alone.

We have done what we can for this world. Take that for what
you will.

How can I explain...? You see, we are not very adept at
aerial combat in this world.

We do not wish to be a hindrance, so we felt that sharing
our data was the better option.
Indeed! We wish you all the best of luck!

You're pretty amazing if you're capable of challenging
Susanomon!

Susanomon is the hero of Shambala. You have to be prepared,
both in mind and body.

If you can defeat Susanomon, we will listen to what you have
to say.
